Package nonprofitbookkeeping.model.budget

package nonprofitbookkeeping.model.budget
Holds budget-specific model structures.

Budget models describe planned allocations, budget line details, and related values used during planning and reporting.

Responsibilities:

  • Represent budget entries and groupings.
  • Support budget import, editing, and reporting.
  • Capture planned versus tracked values.
Since:
1.0

    Description

    Contains core domain and transfer models.

    Provides models for import and export workflows.

    Defines model structures used by reporting features.

    Contains model types specific to Scale Ledger integration.

    Provides model types for supplemental bookkeeping data.

    Description
    Budget
    Stub Budget class for the standalone demo project.
    BudgetLine
    Represents a single line item within a budget.
    Periodicity
    Defines the frequency or period for which budget amounts are specified or broken down.
